content.text:
The plan is written to the plan file. Here's the summary:

**Deliverable:** `index.html` in the current directory — a single, fully self-contained file with all CSS in one `<style>` block, no JavaScript, no external requests.

**Page structure:**
- **Hero** — full-viewport intro with a placeholder name ("Your Name Photography"), tagline, and scroll cue, on a dark gallery-style palette with a system font stack.
- **Gallery** — responsive CSS grid of 6–9 placeholder tiles built from CSS gradients (works offline), each with hover captions and an inline comment showing exactly where to drop in your real photos.
- **About** — short placeholder bio.
- **Contact footer** — email and social links.
- Smooth-scroll navigation and single-column reflow on phones, all in CSS.

**Verification:** open the file in a browser, resize to check the responsive grid, and confirm the page loads with zero network requests.

One default worth flagging: since you didn't mention photos or your name, I'm using gradient placeholders and placeholder text you can swap in later — if you'd rather I wire in specific images or your actual name, just say so and I'll adjust before building.

Note: my usual plan-approval tool (ExitPlanMode) isn't available in this session, so consider this the plan for your approval — approve it or reply with changes and I'll build it.

result:
The plan is written to the plan file. Here's the summary:

**Deliverable:** `index.html` in the current directory — a single, fully self-contained file with all CSS in one `<style>` block, no JavaScript, no external requests.

**Page structure:**
- **Hero** — full-viewport intro with a placeholder name ("Your Name Photography"), tagline, and scroll cue, on a dark gallery-style palette with a system font stack.
- **Gallery** — responsive CSS grid of 6–9 placeholder tiles built from CSS gradients (works offline), each with hover captions and an inline comment showing exactly where to drop in your real photos.
- **About** — short placeholder bio.
- **Contact footer** — email and social links.
- Smooth-scroll navigation and single-column reflow on phones, all in CSS.

**Verification:** open the file in a browser, resize to check the responsive grid, and confirm the page loads with zero network requests.

One default worth flagging: since you didn't mention photos or your name, I'm using gradient placeholders and placeholder text you can swap in later — if you'd rather I wire in specific images or your actual name, just say so and I'll adjust before building.

Note: my usual plan-approval tool (ExitPlanMode) isn't available in this session, so consider this the plan for your approval — approve it or reply with changes and I'll build it.
